hooks.command: echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":"Invoke the caveman skill (full mode) via the Skill tool now, then respond in caveman style for this entire session. Skill at ~/.claude/skills/caveman. Stays active until the user says stop caveman or normal mode."}}'

input=$(cat); cur=$(printf '%s' "$input" | jq -r '.session_title // ""'); prefix='[nonprofiteer] '; case "$cur" in "$prefix"*) title="$cur" ;; "") title="${prefix}$(basename "$(pwd)")" ;; *) title="${prefix}${cur}" ;; esac; jq -cn --arg t "$title" '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"SessionStart",sessionTitle:$t}}'
